Package org.openxava.converters

Interface IConverter

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayBytesBlobConverter, ArrayBytesPhotoConverter, BigDecimalNumberConverter, BigIntegerNumberConverter, Boolean01Converter, BooleanSNConverter, DateUtilSQLConverter, HibernateTypeConverter, IntegerBigDecimalConverter, IntegerNumberConverter, IntegerStringConverter, LongBigDecimalConverter, LongNumberConverter, NoConversionConverter, NotNullDateConverter, NotNullStringConverter, OrdinalEnumIntConverter, StringArrayBytesConverter, StringBlobConverter, StringEnumIntConverter, StringNotNullConverter, StringTimeConverter, TrimStringConverter, ValidValuesBase0Converter, ValidValuesLetterConverter, ValidValuesStringConverter
public interface IConverter extends Serializable

Javier Paniza
